sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this RPG title

special_mechanics.name: First-person dungeon exploration
special_mechanics.description: Players explore 3D dungeon mazes in first-person perspective with character movement through maze corridors

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based combat
special_mechanics.description: Combat system operates similarly to Dragon Quest and Wizardry with turn-based mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: This is a turn-based RPG dungeon crawler, not a real-time action game. Movement parameters (walk/run speeds, acceleration, jump physics, gravity) are not applicable to the gameplay mechanics. The game focuses on turn-based maze exploration and combat rather than character physics. No technical movement or sub-pixel system documentation is available in provided sources.
